name: GitHub MCP
summary: Model Context Protocol server for managing GitHub repositories.
description: Connects the AI agent to your GitHub account to manage repositories, create issues, review pull requests, search code, and submit comments.
setup: Generate a Personal Access Token (classic) on GitHub with 'repo', 'workflow', and 'user' scopes.
Input the token during configuration to securely store it in your Aura vault.

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue on GitHub.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search for text across GitHub repositories.
